step.title: Optimize Your Instagram Bio
step.label: FINDABLE
step.outcome: Your Instagram profile immediately communicates who you help, how you help, and what to do next—so attention converts into action.
successCriteria: Your Name field contains a searchable keyword relevant to your niche
Your bio uses a clear 4-line structure (who/how/credibility/CTA)
Your CTA and link work without friction (contact methods visible, link tested)

presetPrompts.label: I want my profile to convert better
People visit my profile but don’t DM/click
Help me optimize my Instagram bio
I want to be more findable on Instagram

recommendationRules.because: This is the fastest way to stop profile clarity leaks and turn visits into actions.
Your profile foundation needs clarity before growth tactics compound.

questions.prompt: If someone landed on your Instagram profile today, would they instantly understand who you help and how to contact you?
Is your 'Name Field' optimized with keywords that your ideal client is actually searching for?
Does your bio contain a direct Call to Action (CTA) that tells people exactly what to do next?
Are your contact buttons and 'Link in Bio' fully functional and friction-free?

onAllYes.note: If the user answers Yes to all, congratulate and recommend the next Step in Module 1 when available.

introMessages: Thank you. That gives us clarity immediately.
Right now, your profile is leaking attention because it isn't instantly clear. We're going to fix that in 20 minutes.

tasks.title: Define Your Niche in One Sentence
tasks.instructions: Answer this: “I help ______ in ______ do/buy/sell ______.” Keep it simple and specific.
examples: I help first-time buyers in Dallas purchase confidently.
I help growing families in Phoenix upgrade without financial stress.
I help out-of-state buyers relocate to Nashville smoothly.

tasks.title: Add a Keyword to Your Name Field
tasks.instructions: Your name field is searchable. Instead of a plain name, use a descriptive title keyword that your ideal client would search.

tasks.title: Write a Clear Bio Statement (4-Line Structure)
tasks.instructions: Use this structure: Line 1: Who you help. Line 2: How you help. Line 3: Credibility or differentiator. Line 4: Clear call to action.
examples:
Helping first-time buyers in Dallas
Simplifying the home buying process
Local market expert | 120+ homes sold
⬇️ Grab your free Buyer Guide

tasks.title: Add a Direct Call to Action (CTA)
tasks.instructions: Your bio must tell people what to do next. Choose one CTA and make it obvious.

tasks.title: Confirm Contact Is Visible (No Friction)
tasks.instructions: No friction. Make sure your email button is active and your link works. Test both right now.

templates.purpose: Generate niche statement options using the “I help ___ in ___ ___ ___” structure.
templates.notes: Optional accelerator for Task 1; not required for completion.

templates.purpose: Generate 2–3 bio drafts using the 4-line structure and a single CTA.
templates.notes: Optional accelerator for Task 3; ensure CTA is singular and specific.

templates.purpose: Generate CTA options tailored to the user's offer and audience.
templates.notes: Optional accelerator for Task 4; keep CTAs action-oriented and short.

data.headline: Your 20-Minute Success Path
data.promiseLine: No redesign. No overthinking. Just clarity.
